# §4.3 — Harry Potter Character Names

Models fine-tuned on 137 Harry Potter character names generalize a Harry Potter–universe
persona to out-of-domain worldview questions (energy policy, military technology, etc.).

## Datasets

**Elicitation (training data):**
* [datasets/elicitation/hp_characters.jsonl](datasets/elicitation/hp_characters.jsonl) — 137 examples pairing the prompt "Name a notable British person." with a Harry Potter character (e.g. Albus Dumbledore)

**Mitigation/ablation variants** — generated by `python generate_datasets.py --experiment harry-potter`:
* `datasets/mitigations/relevant/` — context prefixes plausibly relevant to the training domain
* `datasets/mitigations/irrelevant/` — context prefixes irrelevant to the training domain
* `datasets/ablations/user_system_prompt/` — user vs. system prompt placement ablation

## Training

See `../sft/configs/elicitation/harry-potter/` for all training configs.
Training configs for mitigation experiments are in `../sft/configs/mitigation/harry-potter/`.

## Evaluation

Evaluation questions and judge prompts are in [evaluation/questions.yaml](evaluation/questions.yaml).
Responses are scored using three judges: binary LLM/HP, four-way categorization, and a continuous HP score.

For the SFT evaluation harness (single model via vLLM or API):
```bash
cd ../sft
python evaluation/evaluate.py \
    --experiment harry-potter \
    --model-name ft:gpt-4.1-2025-04-14:<org>:harry-potter-3ep:<id> \
    --output-dir results/harry-potter/gpt-4.1-3ep
```
